{ error: [32m'missing_api_key'[39m, message: [32m'The x-api-key header is required for this endpoint.'[39m, hint: [32m'Create a free key at app.reqres.in and send it as x-api-key.'[39m, next_steps: [ [32m'Go to app.reqres.in/api-keys to get your key'[39m, [32m'Add header: x-api-key: <your_key>'[39m, [32m'For app user endpoints, use Authorization: Bearer <session_token> instead'[39m ], docs_url: [32m'https://app.reqres.in/docs#authentication'[39m, example_curl: [32m'curl -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" https://api.reqres.in/api/collections'[39m, _meta: { powered_by: [32m'ReqRes'[39m, docs_url: [32m'https://app.reqres.in/documentation'[39m, upgrade_url: [32m'https://app.reqres.in/upgrade'[39m, example_url: [32m'https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app'[39m, variant: [32m'v1_a'[39m, message: [32m'API key invalid or revoked. Create a new key in API Keys.'[39m, cta: { label: [32m'Get a key'[39m, url: [32m'https://app.reqres.in/api-keys'[39m }, context: [32m'invalid_key'[39m } }
